nodes.label: container-azul fuerte.svg
nodes.summary: SVG icon (96x96) depicting a shipping container in dark/strong blue tones. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Dark Blue Shipping Container Icon
nodes.summary: Flat illustration of a shipping container with corrugated vertical ribs (10 ribs) and two bottom feet/supports. EXTRACTED from SVG path structure.

nodes.label: Strong Blue Color Palette
nodes.summary: Uses fills #5247A7 (main body purple-blue), #3C388E (vertical rib shadows), and #221B5E (feet/supports). Indicates a 'strong'/saturated blue-violet variant. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Corrugated Container Ribs
nodes.summary: Ten repeating vertical rib paths (translate x=15,23,31,39,47,55,63,71,79) simulate the corrugated metal panels of a real shipping container. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Container Base Feet
nodes.summary: Two small darker rectangles at translate(26,72) and translate(60,72) representing the container's base supports/feet. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: ACSD Container UI Asset (Selected/Active State)
nodes.summary: Likely the 'active/selected/hovered' visual state of a container icon in the ACSD app (the 'fuerte'/strong-blue variant complementing a lighter default container icon). Used to represent containers in the shipping/customs domain UI. INFERRED from filename ('azul fuerte' = strong blue) and ACSD project context.

nodes.label: Shipping Container (Domain Concept)
nodes.summary: The icon visually represents the real-world shipping/cargo container entity, a core domain object of the ACSD application. INFERRED.

nodes.label: Container Azul Icon (SVG)
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: 96x96 SVG icon depicting a shipping/cargo container rendered in teal/blue tones (#4BAEA8 fill, #419B9D body, #388E8B vertical ribs, #439EA0 and #1B5C5E base details). EXTRACTED: Composed of a rectangular container body with horizontal top/bottom rails and 10 vertical corrugated ribs/panels, plus base feet shapes. INFERRED: Used in UI as a visual representation/marker for a shipping container entity (likely an available or 'blue/azul' colored container) in the ACSD application.

nodes.label: Teal Container Icon Style
nodes.description: EXTRACTED: Flat-design vector icon using a teal/cyan palette with darker shading for corrugation depth. INFERRED: Visual language consistent with other colored container assets (e.g., red/green variants) used to distinguish container categories or states in the UI.

nodes.label: Container Visual Marker (UI Purpose)
nodes.description: INFERRED: Likely used in the React frontend as an iconographic marker representing a 'blue' (azul) shipping container, possibly to indicate container type, status, or selection state in a container-management dashboard (ACSD = container-related system).

nodes.label: Red Container Icon (SVG)
nodes.description: 96x96 SVG icon depicting a shipping container with vertical corrugated panels. Uses red color palette: outer fill #F07171, body fill #FA5151, and inner ribs #F95252. Represents a 'rojo' (red) state container, likely indicating an alert, error, or critical status in the ACSD UI.

nodes.label: Red Container Status Variant
nodes.description: Filename 'container-rojo' (Spanish for red) suggests a color-coded status icon. In container/logistics UIs, red typically signals critical, error, blocked, or alert state for a shipping container.

nodes.label: Corrugated Container Visual Pattern
nodes.description: 10 repeated vertical rib paths (translate x: 15,23,31,...,79) at y=32 produce the classic corrugated shipping-container side panels, confirming this is a maritime/intermodal container icon.

nodes.label: LogoQuo.png - QUO brand logo image
nodes.description: Logo image file containing the QUO brand wordmark in dark navy blue uppercase bold sans-serif typography with a registered trademark symbol on a white background.

nodes.label: QUO (registered trademark brand)
nodes.description: Brand identity 'QUO' shown as a registered trademark (R symbol) - a wordmark logo.

nodes.label: QUO wordmark design elements
nodes.description: Design: bold uppercase sans-serif letters 'QUO' in dark navy blue (#1A2B5C approx), registered trademark symbol superscript to the right, transparent/white background. Clean modern typographic wordmark.

nodes.label: Project branding asset (third-party logo)
nodes.description: Stored under assets/logos/, suggesting role as a branding asset displayed in the ACSD application UI - likely representing a partner, client, sponsor, or affiliated company named QUO referenced by the project.

links.evidence: SVG renders a side view of an intermodal shipping container with corrugated walls, top rail, and bottom skids at 96x96.
Outer body path fill="#AEAD4B" (yellow-olive) — the file is named container-amarillo (Spanish for yellow).
Inner panel fill="#939D41" provides a darker recessed look inside the container body.
10 identical vertical bar paths use fill="#828E38" for the corrugation ridges.
Filename pattern container-<color>.svg (amarillo=yellow) implies a set of color variants used to indicate different container states.
Yellow color convention in UIs typically denotes warning, caution, or in-progress/pending state for the container.
Asset lives under ACSD/assets and supports the container-tracking UI of the ACSD project.
Ten repeated thin vertical path elements at x=15,23,31,39,47,55,63,71,79 each 35 tall — represent corrugated container wall ridges.
Top horizontal band (the rectangle drawn by the first outer path) forms the container's top rail.
Two short dark segments (#595E1B) at y=72 separated by a lighter middle (#96A043) represent the container's bottom skids/feet.
